validation.futureDate: Date must be in the future

hero.title: Where human intuition
hero.description: We're not here to replace your voice, but to amplify it. We create systems that learn from your essence so you can return to what really matters: creating, imagining, and leading.

newHero.badge: We understand the noise, we seek clarity
newHero.title: Your business is unique,
newHero.description: Does current technology feel like a barrier instead of a bridge? We've helped hundreds of teams recover 15 hours a week of mechanical work so they can focus on the strategy only humans can trace.

features.title: Our pillars are non-negotiable
features.description: We believe technology should serve people, not the other way around. These are the promises we keep in every line of code.

efficiency.title: Invisible Efficiency
efficiency.description: We automate what exhausts you, not what defines you. Systems that work in the background so you are the protagonist.

ethics.title: Ethics by Design
ethics.description: Your data is your legacy. We build with non-negotiable privacy, protecting the trust you've earned with your customers.

closeness.title: Radical Closeness
closeness.description: We don't just deliver code and leave. We are your technological partners, understanding your challenges as if they were our own.

services.title: Solutions that solve, not complicate
services.description: We understand that behind every technical requirement there is a human goal. Here's how we make it happen.

software.title: Software with Meaning
software.description: We don't launch code into the void. We develop tools that eliminate your team's daily friction, giving them back the time they deserve.

design.title: Empathetic Design
design.description: Interfaces that don't need a manual. We put ourselves in the shoes of those who will use your product so that every click is natural and stress-free.

mobility.title: Digital Proximity
mobility.description: Be where your users are, but respectfully. We create mobile experiences that feel like an extension of their daily lives.

clarity.title: Clarity in Chaos
clarity.description: In a world saturated with information, we help your real message reach the people who genuinely need it.

growth.title: Sustainable Growth
growth.description: Scaling doesn't have to be traumatic. We optimize your processes so your project grows at the pace of your ambitions, not your worries.

trust.title: Total Peace of Mind
trust.description: We protect what you value most: your users' trust. We implement robust security so you only worry about innovating.

timeline.title: A path of people, not just code
timeline.description: We look back not to celebrate achievements, but to remember why we started this journey in the first place.

seed.title: The Seed of an Idea
seed.description: We were born in a small studio, tired of seeing how technology was moving away from people.

listening.title: Listening to Real Stories
listening.description: We reached our first 1,000 users, not as numbers, but as conversations that shaped our platform.

growth.title: Growing with Responsibility
growth.description: We received support to expand, always keeping our promise not to lose the human touch.

impact.title: Impact Without Borders
impact.description: We opened offices in 5 countries, learning that the desire to work better is a universal language.

purpose.title: Purposeful Intelligence
purpose.description: We launched our AI features, designed to give you back the time that administrative work stole from you.

timeline.footer: And the story continues with you...

contact.title: Let's talk about what keeps you up at night
contact.description: Do you have a project in mind or just want to understand how technology can give you back your time? We are here to listen to you, without unnecessary technicalities.

subject.label: What do you have in mind?

message.label: Tell us your story
message.placeholder: What is the biggest challenge you face today?

form.submit: Send message and start the chat

footer.description: Humanizing technology so you can be more human. We are not just an AI company, we are your partners in the search for time and purpose.
